category_sources: source_facts.description says glslViewer is a live-coding console tool that renders GLSL shaders; official GitHub repository describes it as a GLSL sandbox/viewer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is glslviewer; source_facts.repo and official repository use the stylized name glslViewer.
docs_sources: Official glslViewer GitHub repository README and wiki are the official documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/patriciogonzalezvivo/glslViewer, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies live GLSL shader rendering; official repository and wiki document GLSL shader viewing/live-coding usage.
